grant_title: Health Promotion and Disease Prevention Research Centers: 2025 Special Interest Project Competitive Supplements (SIPS)
geographic_restrictions: Open to CDC Prevention Research Centers (PRCs) currently funded under CDC Notice of Funding Opportunity RFA-DP-24-004, which includes institutions in the US Northeast (e.g., Emory University, Harvard School of Public Health, New York University School of Medicine, University of Massachusetts Medical School Worcester, University of Pennsylvania, University of Pittsburgh, University of Rochester, University of Vermont).
project_area: Health promotion and disease prevention research, including prostate cancer screening, lung cancer screening, childhood vaccines, overdose prevention, and cancer control programs.
demographic_requirements: None explicitly stated; eligibility is restricted to existing CDC Prevention Research Centers (PRCs).
eligibility_summary: Applicants must be approved for funding under CDC Notice of Funding Opportunity RFA-DP-24-004 (Health Promotion and Disease Prevention Research Centers) to apply for this supplemental funding. Only the 20 institutions currently funded under RFA-DP-24-004 are eligible.
